title: Championella labordei

The genus Championella is a small group of flowering plants that are closely related to the genus Psychotria. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and molecular analysis.

intro: Championella labordei, also known as Champion's herb or Yerbabuena, is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. Championella labordei has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain, inflammation, and promote wound healing.
